Last year I traveled to the beach.
We walked along the coast.
I went to Ubatuba and I swam in the sea.
We ate fish and saw a sunset.
Hi Carolina! Where did you go on vacation?
I went to the beach in Ubatuba. I swam every day and I watched the sunset.
That sounds amazing! I went to the mountains and I took many photos.
Nice! Did you buy a souvenir?
Yes, I bought a small gift. I also sent a postcard to my cousin.
Perfect! Our vacations were wonderful. Welcome back to school!
Last year I went to the beach on vacation.
I swam in the sea and I ate fresh fish.
We watched a beautiful sunset on the beach.
Where did you go on vacation?
I bought a souvenir and I sent a postcard.

Last December, my family and I had an amazing vacation in Ubatuba. We packed our suitcases on Friday night and left São Paulo very early on Saturday morning. The trip took about four hours by car. When we arrived, the weather was perfect and the beach was beautiful. On the first day, I swam in the sea and built castles in the sand with my little brother. We ate fresh fish at a small restaurant near the water. On Sunday, we walked along the coast and we watched a wonderful sunset together. My mother bought a colorful souvenir for my grandmother, and I sent a postcard to my best friend Marina. I took many photos with my camera. It was the best vacation of the year, and I did not want to come home.

Good afternoon, everyone, and welcome to our island tour. Let me tell you about yesterday, because it was a special day for our group. In the morning, we drove to the north of the island and we stopped at a quiet beach. The visitors swam in the clear water and many of them took beautiful photos. After that, we walked through the old town and we visited a small museum. At noon, we ate a typical lunch with fresh fruit and grilled fish. In the afternoon, the group went on a short boat trip along the coast. We saw dolphins near the rocks, and everybody was very happy. We came back to the hotel at sunset. It was a long but wonderful day for all of us.

Carolina is telling the story of her vacation in Ubatuba. First, she packed her suitcase and left São Paulo early in the morning. Then, she arrived at the beach and swam in the sea. After that, she ate fresh fish and walked along the coast. Finally, she watched the sunset and bought a souvenir for her grandmother.
